## What

## Why

<!-- Why is this change needed? Link an issue if relevant. -->

## Type

- [ ] `feat` — new skill or feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change (no new feature, no bug fix)
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — CI, tooling, dependencies

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has a clear `name` and `description` in frontmatter
- [ ] Trigger phrases are documented in the description
- [ ] Error handling is explicit (no silent failures)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] Tested locally with an OpenClaw agent
